## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the bounded change.

## Verification

- [ ] RED evidence: for behavior changes, show a relevant failing test before implementation when RED is applicable; when no meaningful RED step applies, record N/A with a reason: ______.

## Sensitive-data review

Do not include subscription URLs, node lists, credentials, public IPs, or raw logs. Review every redacted support bundle before attaching it, including every file inside the bundle, and remove remaining identifying or access-bearing data.

- [ ] I reviewed this pull request and all attachments for sensitive data.
